name: Apex Credit Fix
description_short: Apex Credit Fix is a credit repair provider based in Jersey City, New Jersey. Rated 4.9/5 with 6,355 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Apex Credit Fix is a credit repair and financial consulting firm based in Jersey City, New Jersey, operating at the intersection of credit counseling and broader personal finance advisory. The company serves consumers looking to address negative items on their credit reports, rebuild damaged credit profiles, and improve their overall financial standing. With a substantial number of Google reviews and a rating that stands well above the industry average, Apex Credit Fix appears to have built a significant client base in the tri-state area and likely beyond.

The firm reportedly offers a range of services consistent with its dual positioning as both a credit counseling service and a financial consultant. This includes analyzing credit reports across all three major bureaus (Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion), identifying inaccurate or unverifiable negative items, and filing disputes on behalf of clients. Beyond dispute resolution, the financial consulting designation suggests the company may also work with clients on broader goals — budgeting, debt management strategy, and longer-term credit-building plans — rather than focusing narrowly on deletion tactics alone.

Consumers considering any credit repair service should understand the legal framework first. The Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered, requires written contracts, and grants consumers a three-day right to cancel. Legitimate credit repair firms must operate within these rules. Before engaging with Apex Credit Fix or any similar company, prospective clients should request a written contract, confirm there are no upfront fees, and understand that no company can legally guarantee specific score improvements or the removal of accurate negative information.

Apex Credit Fix's review volume — over 6,000 ratings at 4.9 stars — is notably high for a local credit services firm and suggests either exceptional operational scale or a strong client referral culture. This is a genuine strength worth weighing. However, the credit repair industry also has a documented history of inflated review profiles, so independent verification through the Better Business Bureau and state consumer protection agencies in New Jersey is advisable. For consumers with legitimate credit inaccuracies to dispute, the company appears to be a well-regarded option; those expecting guaranteed removals of accurate-but-negative items should temper expectations regardless of provider.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exceptionally high Google rating (4.9/5) across a large volume of reviews, indicating consistent client satisfaction
Dual positioning as credit counselor and financial consultant suggests a more holistic approach than dispute-only firms
Physical office in Jersey City, NJ offers in-person accessibility for the dense tri-state metro population
High review count implies significant operational experience and an established client-handling process
Appears to cover all three major credit bureaus in dispute work, maximizing potential impact across the full credit profile
Financial consulting component may address root causes of credit damage, not just surface-level report cleanup
cons: Pricing is not publicly listed, making it difficult to comparison-shop without direct contact
Review volume (6,355) is unusually high for a regional firm and warrants independent verification through BBB and state records
No publicly available information on average dispute timelines or typical score improvement ranges — key metrics for managing expectations
Services may overlap with what consumers can do themselves for free via AnnualCreditReport.com and direct bureau dispute portals
As with all credit repair firms, results are legally limited: accurate negative items cannot be permanently removed regardless of the provider's reputation
best_for: Consumers in Jersey City, New Jersey looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: Apex Credit Fix appears best suited for consumers in the New York metro area who have genuine credit report errors — inaccurate balances, duplicate accounts, unverifiable collections — and want professional help navigating the dispute process with all three bureaus. The main caveat is that prospective clients should independently verify the company's standing with the New Jersey Division of Consumer Affairs and confirm contract terms comply with CROA before paying anything.
services: Three-bureau credit report review and analysis
Dispute letter preparation and filing for inaccurate or unverifiable items
Debt validation requests to original creditors and collection agencies
Goodwill adjustment letters for late payments on otherwise positive accounts
Credit score improvement coaching and milestone planning
Identity theft remediation and fraudulent account disputes
Credit-building strategy (authorized user placement, secured card guidance)
Ongoing credit monitoring and progress reporting
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 111 Town Square Pl Suite 1203, Jersey City, NJ 07310
